name: Alternox
description: Gyre’s signature weapon has two fire modes. Primary fire shocks enemies with electrical orbs. Alternate fire is a large ball of electricity that sticks to any surface and pulses <DT_ELECTRICITY_COLOR>Electricity before it explodes. In Gyre's hands, the weapon has a small amount of multishot.

components.name: Alloy Plate
components.description:
Carbon steel plates used to reinforce Grineer armor.

Location: Venus, Phobos, Ceres, Jupiter, Pluto, and Sedna.

components.name: Argon Crystal
components.description:
A Void based radioactive resource that decays every day it is out of the Void.

Location: Missions in the Void

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: Gyre’s signature weapon has two fire modes. Primary fire shocks enemies with electrical orbs. Alternate fire is a large ball of electricity that sticks to any surface and pulses <DT_ELECTRICITY_COLOR>Electricity before it explodes. In Gyre's hands, the weapon has a small amount of multishot.

drops.location: Zariman Ten Zero (Level  70 - 75 Zariman Bounty), Rotation C

components.name: Entrati Lanthorn
components.description:
A ceremonial beacon used to map Void locations on to real space.

Location: Albrecht's Laboratories (Deimos) and Zariman

components.name: Thrax Plasm
components.description:
Found in the remnants of Thrax Void manifestations, this plasm has several surprisingly practical applications.

Location: Zariman

patchlogs.name: Angels of the Zariman: Hotfix 31.5.1
patchlogs.changes:
Fixed the Alternox’s alt-fire sound FX being heard from across the map. 
Fixed the Alternox missing its Falloff stat: 60% Fall off on alt fire Radial Attack.

patchlogs.name: Update 31.5: Angels of the Zariman
patchlogs.changes:
Alternox Blueprint (New Primary Weapon)
The Alternox is available for purchase via the in-game Market or earn its Blueprint through the Zariman Bounty rewards.
Alternox Rifle
